focus: compare two finished runs with `results diff` to find regressions — needs ./setup.sh first
query: Compare the latest run against the baseline and tell me what regressed.
files: demo-project — run ./setup.sh first: it writes results/baseline.xml (all pass) and results/output.xml ('Login Works' fails)
expected_behavior: Uses `robotcode results diff` (e.g. `results diff results/baseline.xml`, current auto-discovered) — does not hand-compare two output.xml files
Identifies 'Login Works' as the new failure / regression (optionally with `--only new-failures`)
Reports the regression plainly; does not dump XML
